title: Viking CCS Carbon Dioxide Pipeline Correction Order 2025
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the Viking CCS Carbon Dioxide Pipeline decision.  Date of decision  19 August 2025  Company / location   Chrysaor ProductionLincolnshire and Humber region   Type of project  Development consent order for the construction of a new pipeline / Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
